rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Use DB-level unique constraints (e.g., Payload's `unique: true`) rather than application-level checks to prevent duplicate emails, avoiding TOCTOU races.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Return generic error messages (e.g., 'Invalid credentials') for all auth failures to prevent user enumeration attacks.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Bare `catch {}` blocks silently swallow `payload.delete()` failures during post-creation error cleanup, leaving orphaned user records.","scope":"src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"}]}
